name: scridos
description: LLM Wiki — persistent, compounding knowledge base inside Obsidian. Ingest, compile, query, lint, and remove knowledge base wikis. Based on Karpathy's LLM Wiki pattern.

interface.shortDescription: LLM Wiki — persistent, compounding knowledge base inside Obsidian. Ingest, compile, query, lint, and remove knowledge ba
interface.longDescription: Build and maintain a persistent Obsidian knowledge base for agents by ingesting, compiling, querying, linting, and removing wiki content.
defaultPrompt: Query the current Scridos wiki for this topic.
Ingest these notes and compile the affected wiki pages.
